## Requested outcome

Describe the observable user result this pull request must deliver.

## Required acceptance claims

Add one concrete Markdown list item for each required claim. When the Verenne Action uses `claims: pr-body`, every list item in this pull-request body is treated as a required claim. Avoid unrelated bullet lists.

| Claim ID | Claim kind | Changed paths | Base-owned gate or deterministic evidence |

| --- | --- |

| New regression coverage |  |

| Share-safe artifacts inspected |  |

## Compatibility and risk

List provider CLI, model, Node.js, Git, operating-system, migration, security, or cancellation considerations. Write `None` when there are none.
